rationale: PR addresses all five review comments on PR #20 with matching diffs. (1) http.rs is renamed to router.rs (51% similarity rename) and all imports in lib.rs and main.rs are updated (`use api_service::{router, AppState, Cli, Config}` and `router::serve(...)`); (2) the new file handlers/buckets.rs contains BucketDto, BucketsResponse, and list_buckets — exactly the symbols deleted from router.rs — and is wired through handlers/mod.rs (`pub mod buckets;`); (3) build_cors stays in router.rs alongside health and serve; (4) shared/src/indexer_client.rs is created with a generic EventSink trait (`pub trait EventSink: Send + Sync + 'static { fn ingest_event(&self, event: &IndexedEvent); }`) and `pub async fn run<S: EventSink>(url: String, sink: Arc<S>)`, both api-service and quoting-service AppState impls add `impl shared::indexer_client::EventSink for AppState`, and the per-service indexer_client.rs files are deleted; tests/src/lib.rs Harness now calls `shared::indexer_client::run`; (5) Bucket struct is extracted from state.rs into bucket.rs with `use crate::bucket::Bucket;` in state.rs. Tests in state.rs now import `shared::indexer_client::EventSink` to call ingest_event through the trait. Clean refactor with consistent renames and no behavior change.
